snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH. You asked for it. This was absolutely INSANE.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames 
George:  @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap:  @Sapnap 
Antfrost:  @Antfrost 
awesamdude:  @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
snippet.description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb

localized.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
localized.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it

snippet.title: Uncanny Cold Cases - Trailer
snippet.description:
Each episode sees Danny Robins and paranormal experts Evelyn Hollow and Dr Ciaran O’Keeffe turn detective and investigate a historical haunting from classic cases like ghosthunter Harry Price’s infamous enquiry into Borley Rectory, and Britain’s most violent poltergeist, the Black Monk of Pontefract; to lesser-known ones, such as the nightmarish Sandown Clown on the Isle of Wight, and America’s original UFO abduction story, the Barney and Betty Hill Incident.

The Cold Cases team will pore over all the elements that have made these paranormal stories endure, sometimes over centuries, and put them under the magnifying glass. Danny will bring some of the most head-scratching, terrifying moments from the cases to life, telling the stories in his trademark terrifying style, and then the team will discuss the phenomena and look for possible explanations for what happened. Can the Uncanny team make sense of these strange cases that have haunted history?

Uncanny Cold Cases will be available on YouTube and BBC Sounds from 7 April.

snippet.title: Morgan Luna - Infinite Love | Soul Blues | Emotional Blues Music
snippet.description:
In the quiet depth of an emotion that needs no explanation, “Infinite Love” by Morgan Luna unfolds like a whisper that moves through the soul. This Soul Blues track explores a deep, calm, and transformative kind of love—one that doesn’t demand, doesn’t force… it simply stays.

With an intimate yet powerful vocal performance, the song tells a story of healing and rediscovery. The guitar answers with tender, expressive phrasing, while Rhodes and organ wrap every moment in warmth, creating a smooth, cinematic atmosphere that feels both timeless and deeply personal.

“Infinite Love” is not about promises or illusions, but about a real connection—the kind that grows in silence, holds you in the dark, and keeps breathing even when everything else fades away. A modern emotional blues piece for those who seek depth, soul, and authenticity.

If you’ve ever felt a love that exists beyond words… this song will find you.

Support the music & official store:
https://morganluna.com/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Grey Hulk (2026) - Dwayne Johnson, Mark Ruffalo, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#GreyHulk #DwayneJohnson #MarkRuffalo 

Watch This Grey Hulk Fan Made Concept Trailer

A military volunteer walks into a secret underground facility seeking purpose and walks out as a nine-foot nightmare of pure destruction. Dwayne Johnson transforms into the Grey Hulk, a titan of slate-colored rage born from a gamma experiment that tears apart everything science thought it understood. Harrison Ford commands with terrifying authority as General Thaddeus Ross, the decorated military leader who created this monster and now becomes one himself, injecting experimental serum into his own veins to rise as the Red Hulk. Amanda Seyfried stands between destruction and humanity as Dr. Elena Ross, a brilliant scientist forced to choose between her father's orders and protecting the tortured man she sees beneath the monster's skin.

When two Hulks collide across scorched deserts and crumbling cities, the shockwaves echo far beyond this dimension. Mark Ruffalo steps through a portal as the Green Hulk, drawn by a gamma pulse that called to him across the multiverse, arriving to help a fellow monster discover what he himself fought years to understand. Three titans now share one battlefield while a daughter defies her father and a soldier battles to reclaim his stolen humanity. Lyrics: Dear Future Husband - Meghan Trainor (Lyrics/Letra)

[Intro]
Dear future husband
Here's a few things you'll need to know if
You wanna be my one and only
All my life
(Ah)

[Verse 1]
Take me on a date, I deserve it, babe
And don't forget the flowers every anniversary
'Cause if you'll treat me right, I'll be the perfect wife
Buyin' groceries, buy-buyin' what you need
You got the 9 to 5, but, baby, so do I
So don't be thinkin' I'll be home and bakin' apple pies
I never learned to cook, but I can write a hook
Sing along with me, sing, sing along with me (Hey)

[Pre-Chorus]
You've gotta know how to treat me like a lady (Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
(Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
Even when I'm actin' crazy
Tell me everything's alright
(Ah)

[Chorus]
Dear future husband
Here's a few things you'll need to know if
You wanna be my one and only
All my life
Dear future husband
If you wanna get that special lovin'
Tell me I'm beautiful each and every night (Woo, huh)

[Verse 2]
After every fight, just apologize
And maybe then I'll let you try and rock my body right
Even if I was wrong, you know I'm never wrong
Why disagree? Why, why disagree?

[Pre-Chorus]
You've gotta know how to treat me like a lady (Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
(Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
Even when I'm actin' crazy
Tell me everything's alright
(Ah) Oh

[Chorus]
Dear future husband
Here's a few things you'll need to know if
You wanna be my one and only
All my life (Hey, baby, hey)
Dear future husband
Make time for me, don't leave me lonely
And no, we'll never see your family more than mine

[Bridge]
I'll be sleepin' on the left side of the bed (Hey)
Open doors for me and you might get some kisses
Don't have a dirty mind, just be a classy guy (Ah, ah-ah, ah)
Buy me a ring, buy, buy me a ring, babe


[Pre-Chorus]
You've gotta know how to treat me like a lady (Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
(Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
Even when I'm actin' crazy
Tell me everything's alright (Woo, hey)
(Ah)

[Chorus]
Dear future husband
Here's a few things you'll need to know if
You wanna be my one and only
All my life
Dear future husband (Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
If you wanna get that special lovin' (Doom-doom-doom-doom-doom)
Tell me I'm beautiful each and every night (Ooh, that's right)

[Outro]
(Oh, woah) Future husband, better love me right

snippet.title: Hermitcraft S11#8: Prospect Hunters - The Plan
snippet.description:
Today we get started on our main mini-game project called "Prospect Hunters". We go over the rough plan for the design decisions, game rules, the resources, how the challenges will work, the scope of the project, and what building needs to be done. We also do some redstone designing for the Targets and Loot Generation that the game will feature a lot of.

We head back to base to check out a few things and then have some fun building a 1 furnace Super Smelter. We end the episode with the 5th and final Nautalius Race that determines who gets into the Championship.

Hermitcraft Website: http://www.hermitcraft.com
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/EthoLP

#hermitcraft #etho #minecraft

snippet.title: SUPERGIRL Official Trailer 2 Teaser (2026)
snippet.description:
Check out the new trailer teaser for Supergirl! In theaters June 26, 2026.

While celebrating her 21st birthday, Kara Zor-El travels across the galaxy with her dog Krypto, during which she meets the young Ruthye Marye Knoll and goes on a "murderous quest for revenge".
